target_repo.description: Path of the repo to analyze, relative to this config file

output_dir.description: Where analyses, summaries, manifest, and INDEX live

groups.description: Logical grouping rules — each matched file rolls up to a _SUMMARY.md

kinds.description: Map of kind name → glob patterns. First match wins.

force_proportional.description: Kinds for which the analyzer should keep walkthroughs short (generated/dist artifacts)

tools.description: User's own deterministic tools. Run by `mhng-repo-mind lint`; their output is prepended to audit passes so the LLM does not re-report.

hooks.description: Lifecycle hooks (spec v1.6). Each key is `on_<command>_<phase>` where command is init|sync|add|audit|compliance|... and phase is start|end. `on_any_start` and `on_any_end` fire for every command. Each value is an array of shell commands run from target_repo. on_*_start failures are fatal; on_*_end failures are non-fatal warnings.

exposures.description: Downstream consumers OUTSIDE this codebase (sibling apps, dashboards, mobile clients, partner integrations). drift and audit walk into them so cross-repo impact shows up in PR reports.

sources.description: Declared external sources WITHOUT a lockfile (REST APIs, OAuth providers, etc). Things WITH a lockfile are auto-detected.

last_reviewed.description: ISO 8601 date of the last human review of this source. Used by `mhng-repo-mind freshness` to flag stale sources.

freshness.description: Freshness window for this source (spec v1.5). Borrowed from dbt source freshness.

materializations.description: Per-kind override of analysis depth, template, source flag, audit inclusion, token estimate. Defaults live in src/materializations.mjs.

processes.description: User-declared business processes (spec v1.7). Each process is an independent recursive tree of stages. mhng-repo-mind generates a multi-file deep-dive per process: one OVERVIEW.md per non-leaf node, one <stage>.md per leaf. Stages are resolved against the manifest via file_patterns and/or tags_include. Names are stable across runs — `mhng-repo-mind process --discover` proposes a draft for human review, never writes config.

frameworks.description: Frameworks to include in reports. If omitted, all are included.

jurisdictions.description: Jurisdictions the codebase serves (informational — drives disclaimers).

required_controls.description: Per-framework list of control IDs that MUST have at least one implementing file. `coverage --strict` exits non-zero if any are missing.

intent_rules.description: Custom rules evaluated by `mhng-repo-mind coverage`. Each rule has `name`, `when` (file_matches/tags_include/kind), and `require` (tags_include or compliance_framework_includes).

processNode.description: Recursive process/stage node. Top-level entries are processes (the root); nested entries under `stages` are stages and substages. A leaf node MUST have file_patterns and/or tags_include. A branch node's covered files are the union of its descendants' files.

name.description: Stable identifier within its parent. Must be unique among siblings. Use snake_case. Renaming is a manual operation — never auto-renamed.

group.description: Top-level only. Optional grouping label for INDEX.md rendering. Has no semantic meaning beyond presentation.

compliance_relevant.description: Top-level only. If true, the process appears in compliance and audit reports as a unit, not just file-by-file.

file_patterns.description: Glob patterns (resolved against target_repo) that match this stage's source files. Required for leaf stages unless tags_include is set.

tags_include.description: Frontmatter `intents[].id` values whose files belong to this stage. Required for leaf stages unless file_patterns is set. Tag-based discovery survives folder reorganization.

lock.description: If true, mhng-repo-mind process skips regenerating this node's .md even when its source files change. Hand-tuned content is preserved.

stages.description: Child stages. A node with `stages` is a branch (gets OVERVIEW.md); without `stages` is a leaf (gets <name>.md).
